zh.Barney, Norfolk, England: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可巴尼
zh.lifeSummary: Adam De Berney於1145年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可巴尼。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於1195年在他的家鄉享年50歲。

zh-hans.Barney, Norfolk, England: 英国英格兰諾福爾可巴尼
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Adam De Berney于1145年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可巴尼。他至少有1个儿子。他去世于1195年在他的家乡享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Berney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Biorna ‘son of Biorna’. See Burney 2 and McBurney .
French: from a derivative of the personal name Bernard or any other name composed of the ancient Germanic element ber(n) ‘bear’.

variants.name: Burney
meanings: English (northern, of Norman origin): habitational name from Bernay in Eure, France, named with a Gaulish personal name Brenno + the locative suffix -acum.
Irish (Antrim) and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Biorna ‘son of Biorna’, a Gaelic form of the Old Norse personal name Bjarni (from björn ‘bear cub, warrior’).

nameMeanings.name: Adam
meanings: Hebrew: The Scripture name, in Hebrew, Adham, signifying 'man;' literally earthy, red earth; Rudolph, however, says the name in Ethiopic means ' to be fair, beautiful.' Hence the nurse-name Addy, little Adam.

en.lifeSummary: Adam De Berney was born in 1145, in Barney, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. He had at least 1 son. He died in 1195, in his hometown, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Adam De Berney est né en 1145, à Barney, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1195, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Adam De Berney wurde 1145 in Barney, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1195 im Alter von 50 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Adam De Berney è nato il nel 1145 nel Barney, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1195, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.Barney, Norfolk, England: イギリスイギリスノーフォルクバーニー
ja.lifeSummary: Adam De Berneyは1145年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクバーニーで生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1195年に故郷で50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam De Berney(은)는 1145년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 바른이에서 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1195년 그의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Barney, Norfolk, England: Barney, Norðfolc, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Adam De Berney nasceu em 1145, em Barney, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1195, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Adam De Berney родился в 1145 г. в местности барни, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1195 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Adam De Berney nació en 1145, en Barney, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1195, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años.

th.Barney, Norfolk, England: แบรนีย, เนอรโฟลก, อังกฤษ, สหราชอาณาจักร

vi.Barney, Norfolk, England: Barney, Norfolk, Anh, Vương quốc Liên hiệp
